styleInstructions: Write HTML that matches the website article style. Use clean sections, specs tables, comparison tables, FAQ blocks, CTA blocks, callout notes, and company credibility blocks. Do not output full-page HTML, CSS, Markdown, or scripts.

components.hero: Optional intro block with headline, summary, and buyer-focused context.
components.specTable: Use tables for specs, materials, tolerances, lead time notes, and comparison criteria.
components.callout: Use restrained callout boxes for procurement warnings, compliance notes, and RFQ reminders.
components.faq: Use clear FAQ sections for MOQ, lead time, samples, customization, drawings, shipping, and after-sales.
components.cta: Use practical CTA blocks: request a quote, send drawings, download catalog, or talk to an engineer.
components.credibilityBlock: End with a company/team credibility block.
